hero.headline: I build the interface between humans and AI models
hero.title: LLM & AI Product Integration

about.title: About me
about.pullquote: ~9 years building products where AI meets business reality
about.bio_1: I'm a senior engineer based in Lima, Peru, specializing in integrating large language models into real products that scale. I've worked with companies in Mexico, Spain, and the US, building everything from RAG pipelines to microservice systems processing millions of monthly requests.
about.bio_2: My approach combines distributed systems engineering with the latest AI capabilities — turning models into product features that users actually love.

expertise.title: Specialties
expertise.llm_desc: OpenAI, Anthropic, real-time streaming with WebSockets/SSE
expertise.rag_desc: Pinecone, pgvector, embeddings and semantic retrieval
